# ML-MLOps-Production-Template

> Agent-driven template for production ML systems.
> Version: v1.3.0 | License: MIT | Author: DuqueOM

## What this is
A complete, opinionated MLOps template for shipping ML models to production.
Includes an agentic system for Windsurf, Claude Code, and Cursor, production
templates for every stack layer, and 12 encoded anti-patterns.

## Key files
- AGENTS.md: Root agent rules, 12 anti-patterns, invariants
- CLAUDE.md: Claude Code-specific rules and context
- QUICK_START.md: 5-minute onboarding guide
- RUNBOOK.md: Operational runbook
- CHANGELOG.md: Full version history (v1.0.0 → v1.3.0)

## Structure
- .claude/rules/ — Claude Code behavioral constraints
- .cursor/rules/ — Cursor behavioral constraints
- .windsurf/rules/ — 9 Windsurf context-aware rules
- .windsurf/skills/ — 8 operational procedures
- .windsurf/workflows/ — 8 slash-command workflows
- templates/service/ — FastAPI + training + monitoring boilerplate
- templates/k8s/ — Deployment, HPA, Kustomize, Argo Rollouts
- templates/infra/terraform/ — GCP (GKE) + AWS (EKS) Terraform
- templates/cicd/ — GitHub Actions (CI, deploy, drift, retrain)
- templates/monitoring/ — Prometheus alerts + Grafana dashboard
- examples/minimal/ — Minimal working example

## Releases
v1.3.0 (latest), v1.2.0, v1.1.0, v1.0.0
